scripts.env:flush: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const env={...process.env,MSYS_NO_PATHCONV:'1'};const wp=execSync('docker ps --filter publish=8890 --format {{.Names}}',{env}).toString().trim().replace('wordpress','cli');execSync('docker exec '+wp+' wp option update permalink_structure /%postname%/ --allow-root',{stdio:'inherit',env});execSync('docker exec '+wp+' wp rewrite flush --allow-root',{stdio:'inherit',env});"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
